name: score_gap
description: Given an obligation with no satisfactory mapped control, score the compliance gap on severity dimensions and 5 residual-risk dimensions (0.0-1.0), then suggest remediation actions.

penalty_context.description: Brief text about regulatory enforcement patterns for this regulation

severity.description: How bad is the impact if unaddressed (0=trivial, 1=existential). Float 0.0-1.0.

detectability.description: How easily would this miss be detected — higher means HARDER to detect, i.e. higher risk (0=obvious, 1=silent failure). Float 0.0-1.0.

blast_radius.description: How many users/systems affected (0=one user, 1=whole org). Float 0.0-1.0.

recoverability.description: Cost of recovery (0=trivial rollback, 1=unrecoverable data loss). Float 0.0-1.0.
